form.formComment: A scintillating 27.79 over the 500m trip. Expected to push the clock again here.

form.formComment: Has finished seventh at the last two runs, both at Sandown, the latest when beaten 9 lengths behind Abdulla Zulu over 515m. Top-three hope with the right run.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (29.82) when fourth over 515m at Sandown in a Grade 4/5. Strong record off the draw with five wins and two minors from eight starts. Looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (29.82) when fourth over 515m at Sandown in a Grade 4/5. Strong record off the draw with five wins and two minors from eight starts. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Had been racing in honest fashion before missing the frame last time out, finishing sixth (30.21) at The Meadows. Tends to run fairly well off the tricky draw but needs to find best form to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Had been racing in honest fashion before missing the frame last time out, finishing sixth (30.21) at The Meadows. Tends to run fairly well off the tricky draw but needs to find best form to feature.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th on April 3 over 520m at this track behind Sparring beaten 8 lengths (30.44) in a Grade 4/5. Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when seventh but had been in strong form prior to that, winning two on end before placing two back. Suited here and expected to bounce back.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.22) when sixth over 525m at The Meadows in a Free For All. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and four minors. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when third (29.83) over 515m at Sandown. Jumps from a wide draw. Top-three aspirations.
